passages.passage_text: Study the following information carefully to answer the questions given below. I. L, M, N, P, Q, R and S are sitting in a circle and playing cards. II. N, who is the neighbour of P, is not the neighbour of R. III. Q is the second to the left of R. IV. N is second to the left of S, who is the neighbour of M.

Study the following information carefully to answer the given questions. Eight friends A, B, C, D, E, F, G and H are sitting around a circle facing the centre but not necessarily in the same order. Only one person sits between D and F. B sits second to right of H. H is not an immediate neighbour of D. C is not an immediate neighbour of D. E is an immediate neighbour of H.

Study the following information carefully to answer the questions given below. P, T, V, R, M, D, K and W are sitting around a circular table facing the centre. V is second to the left of T. T is fourth to the right of M. D and P are not immediate neighbours of T. D is third to the right of P. W is not an immediate neighbour of P. P is to the immediate left of K.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Which of the following is true?

choices.a: Q is the neighbour of S and L
choices.b: M is the neighbour of S and L
choices.c: R is the neighbour of P and M
choices.d: L is the neighbour of P and Q

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Which of the following pairs has the second person sitting second to the right of the first person?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Which of the following pairs has the first person sitting third to the left of the second person?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Who is to the immediate right of S?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: What is the position of L?

choices.a: To the immediate right of R
choices.b: Second to the left of M
choices.c: To the immediate right of Q

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Which of the following is not true?

choices.a: R is to the immediate left of Q
choices.b: P is to the immediate right of R
choices.c: N is to the immediate right of P
choices.d: L is to the immediate left of M

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: What is the position of E with respect to the position of C?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Who amongst the following sits exactly between A and G?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Four of the following five are alike in a certain way and thus form a group. Which is the one that does not belong to that group?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Which of the following is true with respect to given seating arrangement?

choices.a: Both A and D are immediate neighbours of E
choices.b: C sits exactly between H and F
choices.c: Only three people sit between C and E
choices.d: H is to the immediate left of B

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Who amongst the following sits third to the left of F?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Who is second to the left of K?

questions.body: Who is to the immediate left of V?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Who is the third to the right of V?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: What is R's position with respect to V?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Four of the following five are alike in a certain way based on their positions in the above sitting arrangement and so form a group. Which of the following does not belong to that group?
